signals.headline: Democrats on House Oversight repeatedly tried (and failed) to subpoena Elon Musk over his DOGE role and federal oversigh
signals.raw: Democrats on House Oversight repeatedly tried (and failed) to subpoena Elon Musk over his DOGE role and federal oversight, rejected on party-line votes (e.g., 21-20 in June 2025).[1][2]

signals.raw:
House Democrats launched a 2025 pressure campaign urging 3 GOP defections for the Taxpayer Data Protection Act to block Musk's access to Treasury data, but Republicans backed DOGE amid debt concerns.[4]

No mentions of midterms or Congress shifts in results; nothing recent enough to impact prediction markets like Polymarket odds on elections, DOGE, or Musk testimony.[1][2][3][4][5]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February 2026, with monthly inflation at 0.34% and CPI at 118.8, per the latest data release.[1] This uptick above the Bank of Korea's 2% target—amid prior moderation to 2.0% in January—aligns with recent BoK decision to hold rates at 2.
